skills.description: Executes n8n-atom automated workflows and integrates with the MCP inspector bridge.
trigger_conditions: Deploying and orchestrating automation logic within the local stack.
anti_triggers: Not applicable for standalone use cases outside n8n-atom ecosystem.

skills.description: Expert guidance for writing JavaScript code in n8n Code nodes, covering best practices, essential rules, and common patterns.
trigger_conditions: Need to write JavaScript in n8n using $input/$json/$node syntax
anti_triggers: Simple field mapping or basic filtering

skills.description: Expert guidance for writing Python code in n8n Code nodes, including best practices, data access patterns, and return format requirements.
trigger_conditions: When working with Python in n8n Code nodes
For data transformations better suited to Python
When specific Python standard library functions are needed

skills.description: A guide for writing correct n8n expressions in workflows, covering syntax, variables, and common pitfalls.
anti_triggers: using Code nodes for JavaScript access
using expressions in webhook paths or credentials

skills.description: Validates JSON output and pushes it as a workflow to an n8n instance.
trigger_conditions: When JSON output needs to be validated and deployed to n8n
anti_triggers: When deploying workflows without validating the JSON output

skills.description: Expert guide for using n8n-mcp MCP tools effectively, covering node discovery, configuration validation, and workflow management with detailed workflows, common patterns, and best practices.
trigger_conditions: Searching for specific nodes by keyword
anti_triggers: Purely theoretical discussions without practical implementation details

skills.description: This skill provides expert guidance for operation-aware node configuration in n8n, focusing on property dependencies and progressive disclosure. It covers common configuration patterns by node type and offers a step-by-step workflow to configure nodes effectively.
trigger_conditions: Looking for specific field in node configuration
anti_triggers: Purely theoretical and lacks practical implementation details

skills.description: Expert guide for interpreting and fixing n8n validation errors, emphasizing iterative validation, error severity levels, common error types, and best practices.
trigger_conditions: Workflow configuration needs to be validated

skills.description: Proven architectural patterns for building n8n workflows, covering common use cases such as webhook processing, HTTP API integration, database operations, AI agent workflows, and scheduled tasks.
anti_triggers: Complex workflows when simple patterns suffice
